scripts.test: npm run build && node -e "const { foreignMinorToMainMinor, convertMinorBetweenUsdMxnEur } = require('./lib/forex.js'); const assert = require('assert'); const r = { USD: 0.05, EUR: 0.048 }; assert.strictEqual(foreignMinorToMainMinor(10000,'USD','MXN',r), 200000); const eur = convertMinorBetweenUsdMxnEur(10000,'USD','EUR',r); assert.strictEqual(eur, 9600); assert.strictEqual(convertMinorBetweenUsdMxnEur(eur,'EUR','USD',r), 10000); console.log('forex ok');"
